summary: Iteration 9 - Testing new POS features: System settings, Employee management, Stock alerts, Stock taking, Refunds, Hold/Recall orders, Daily settlement, Bestsellers, POS cashier list login, Decimal quantity. Fixed 3 backend bugs during testing (current_user['id'] -> current_user['user_id']).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/auth/cashiers returns user list without passwords ✓
Backend: PUT /api/settings/system saves settings (verified via GET) ✓
Backend: GET /api/stock-alerts returns low stock products ✓
Backend: POST /api/stock-taking creates draft stock taking ✓
Backend: POST /api/refunds rejects invalid order_no with 404 ✓
Frontend POS: Cashier list shows user avatars for login selection ✓
Frontend POS: Click cashier -> password input appears -> login works ✓
Frontend POS: Cart quantity input supports decimal (2.5, 1.5 etc) ✓
Frontend POS: F4 Hold button holds current cart ✓
Frontend POS: F10 Recall button shows held orders modal ✓
Frontend POS: F11 Refund button shows refund modal with order# input ✓
Frontend Admin /admin/settings: System Settings page loads ✓
Frontend Admin /admin/employees: Employee management page loads ✓
Frontend Admin /admin/stock-alerts: Stock alerts page loads ✓
- Shows 'No data' with green checkmark when all stock is OK ✓
Frontend Admin /admin/stock-taking: Stock taking page loads ✓

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: create_stock_taking uses current_user['id'] but JWT payload has user_id
delete_employee uses current_user['id'] for self-delete check

critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are implemented and working correctly
Backend JWT uses 'user_id' key but code was using 'id' - fixed 3 occurrences
POS cashier login flow works smoothly with avatar selection
Decimal quantity in cart updates total correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test employee TEST_cashier1 (cleaned up), used existing products/warehouses for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent:
All 10 new features tested and verified:
1. POS Cashier Login: Shows user avatars, click to select then enter password
2. Decimal Quantity: Cart input supports 0.1 step, calculates total correctly
3. System Settings: Full page with company info, print, scanner, wholesale sections
4. Employee Management: CRUD operations, role/permissions assignment
5. Stock Alerts: Shows products below min_stock with critical/warning levels
6. Stock Taking: Warehouse selection, create taking with draft/confirmed status
7. Hold/Recall (F4/F10): Cart persistence, held orders modal
8. Refund (F11): Modal with order# input, creates refund record
9. Daily Settlement: Report by date with payment method breakdown
10. Bestsellers: Top/bottom products by sales amount

Fixed 3 backend bugs: JWT payload uses 'user_id' not 'id' - updated stock-taking, employee delete, refund creation.
